title: Traders in a better disguise
description: Retextured Traders in Disguise - The Illager Assassin Project
body:
# 🏹Description
This pack retextured items and mobs in the [Traders in Disguise - The Illager Assassin Project](https://modrinth.com/mod/traders-in-disguise-the-illager-assassin-project) mod.
